basic_details.job_title: CARI Guwahati Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati (CARI Guwahati)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in age for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be applicable as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. (Pharmacology), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology), M. Pharm (Pharmacology), M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology), M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience
qualification.details: M.D. (Pharmacology) or M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology) or M. Pharm (Pharmacology) or M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology) or M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience

all_official_links.label: Download CARI Guwahati Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology) Job 2026 Notificati

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CARI Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 50,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.D. (Pharmacology), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology), M. Pharm (Pharmacology), M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology), or M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the date of the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held on 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview location?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati, Assam.
